examples.title: Adjacency Matrix Initialization
examples.description: Creating adjacency matrix for undirected graph
examples.code:
PROCEDURE CreateMatrix(n):
    matrix = ARRAY[n][n]
    FOR i FROM 0 TO n-1:
        FOR j FROM 0 TO n-1:
            matrix[i][j] = 0
    RETURN matrix
examples.explanation: Initializes n x n matrix with all zeros representing no initial connections

examples.explanation: Dynamic structure where each vertex maps to its neighbors
